maturityCards.descEs: Necesitas la cartilla. >30 min. Output con correccion significativa.
maturityCards.descEn: Need the workbook. >30 min. Output needs significant correction.

maturityCards.descEs: Sin consultar. ~30 min. Output utilizable con ajustes menores.
maturityCards.descEn: Without checking. ~30 min. Usable output with minor adjustments.

transitionRules.noviceToTraineeEs: 4 ejecuciones consecutivas de un flujo sin consultar el playbook y con output publicado el mismo dia.
transitionRules.noviceToTraineeEn: 4 consecutive executions of a flow without consulting the playbook, with output published same day.
transitionRules.traineeToAutoEs: Ensenaste el flujo a 1 colega Y esa persona lo ejecuto sola con output aceptable.
transitionRules.traineeToAutoEn: You taught the flow to 1 colleague AND that person executed it alone with acceptable output.
transitionRules.regressionEs: Si no ejecutas un flujo por 3+ semanas consecutivas, regresas un nivel. Re-inicias con 4 repeticiones para recuperar nivel.
transitionRules.regressionEn: If you don't execute a flow for 3+ consecutive weeks, you drop one level. Restart with 4 repetitions to recover.

metrics.labelEs: Verificable — cada dato trazable a fuente
metrics.labelEn: Verifiable — every data point traceable to source

acceptanceCriteria.criterionEs: VR-AID producido desde evidencia real, no desde opinion
acceptanceCriteria.criterionEn: VR-AID produced from real evidence, not from opinion

_composerNotes: Placeholders: {{OUTPUT_TYPE}}, {{DELIVERABLE_LIST}}, {{USE_CASES}}, {{CORE_FLOWS}}, {{CORE_FLOW_1}}, {{CORE_FLOW_2}}, {{CORE_FLOW_3}} are resolved from the flows array. Metrics and acceptance criteria are generic but their labels adapt to the specific playbook.
